content.en:
"The fourth realm needs to raise the soul will to the ninth dimension before it can break through to the fifth realm?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

This is very difficult, you must know that his copy body of the third realm is only in the fifth dimension, how difficult it is to upgrade to the ninth dimension.

"How do you know what dimension your soul will is in?"

Ye Tian asked again.

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon did not hide it, and said truthfully: "Actually, it is not difficult, the division of the will dimension is actually that one's soul will can break through to the first few layers of dimensional space, which requires a secret technique for testing, it is almost difficult to learn on the side of the territory of the fifth thousand, but it is not difficult on the side of the territory of the fourth thousand, I will too, just pass it on to you!"

Wow!

A ball of light containing that secret technique, soul will, secret technique, was given to Ye Tian.

After Ye Tian accepted it, he obtained this secret technique.

"Thousand Dimensions!"

This Soul Will Secret Technique is not complicated, it is just a simple test secret technique.

Ye Tian quickly learned, and the Tricky Wood Red Dragon also left.

......

"It's time to test what level of soul will my real body replica body is!"

917 "Thousand Dimensions Technique, Begin!"

Rumble!

Ye Tian's soul will turned into a ray of light, breaking through layers of dimensions.

The first dimension, break!

The second dimension, break!

The third dimension, broken!

Soon, Ye Tian's soul will broke through the sixth dimension, but when he was in the seventh dimension, it took him a long time before he finally barely broke through the seventh dimension.

"I didn't expect that my soul will only barely broke through to the seventh dimension!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This is a big gap from the ninth dimension that impacted the fifth realm.

According to what the Tricky Wood Red Dragon said, starting from the seventh dimension, every time you upgrade a layer of dimension, it is extremely difficult, breaking through the bottleneck of the dimension, and even ten times more difficult.

Even on the side of the Four Thousand Realm, there are many ways to improve the Willpower Dimension, but it is extremely rare to be able to reach the Fourth Realm of the Ninth Dimension in the end, and many of the Fourth Realm from the big forces have the Fifth Realm as a backer behind them, and it is still difficult to break through to the Ninth Dimension.

Of course.

Specifically, how to improve the realm of the will dimension, the Tricky Wood Red Dragon is naturally not clear (daaa) Chu, after all, he is only a third realm.

"If I complete the test of the Will Tablet, I may be able to obtain the inheritance knowledge and treasures of the Will Dimension. "

Ye Tian muttered.

It's a pity that his true body copy body can no longer enter, otherwise the real body copy body will go in, and the soul will to be promoted is truly improved.

And unlike now, even if the third realm copy body is raised to the seventh dimension, it will not help the body much.

......

Hundreds of extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian once again sent a copy body into the inheritance land of the Wumu Realm Lord, and went straight to the Wumu True Map.

He knew very well that it would take a long time for him to pass through the Will Stone, and he didn't want to wait any longer, so he naturally wanted to pass the test of the Wumu True Diagram and obtain more beneficial resources and the second layer of the Three Black Secret Method.

This time.

He didn't try to pass the test instantly, but deliberately delayed the time, and it took hundreds of extradimensional epochs to pass the test, which was not outrageous.

And this time, he successfully obtained the second layer of the inheritance of the Three Black Secret Method.

In the past, Ye Tian didn't look down on this mere Tianwei Guo, but now that he knows the importance of the soul will, he naturally wants to improve the soul will.

This replica body came out of the Land of Inheritance, and then the real replica body took the Tianwei Fruit and swallowed it in one gulp.

Rumble!!!!!

His soul will was quickly refined, and the effect of this refining was many times more amazing than the refining effect obtained in the Will Stone.

But just one Tianwei Fruit can't last long.

A period of time passed, Ye Tian refined the Heavenly Fruit and his soul will indeed skyrocketed.

After that, he used the Thousand Dimension Technique to detect it, and found that his soul will could easily break through the seventh dimension, but it was still far from breaking the eighth dimension, unless he was given another ten hundred Heavenly Dimensional Fruits.

But apparently, this is impossible.

This inheritance land is just an ordinary inheritance land left over from the sixth realm, and the grade is not high, so naturally it is impossible to have too ungodly treasures.

However, even if the grade is not high, for Ye Tian, it is an unimaginable treasure, it can help him improve so much soul will at once, this is already very good, it is too unrealistic to want to ascend to the sky and raise the soul will to the eighth dimension in one step.

If the soul will is so easy to improve, the transcendent realm of the fifth realm will not be so rare.

According to what the Tricky Wood Red Dragon said, on the side of the 4000th Territory, the fifth realm is also very rare, and the sixth realm is a legend.

......

The land of inheritance, the stone of will.

Ye Tian's soul will that copied the body has been tempered by the will stone, but the refining efficiency is not high, even if hundreds of extradimensional epochs have passed, it still hasn't stepped into the sixth dimension, it seems that it is still a little worse.

According to this efficiency, even if another thousand extradimensional epochs have passed, he will be promoted to the sixth dimension at most, and if he wants to be promoted to the seventh dimension, if there is no breakthrough in cultivation, it is estimated that even if he is given tens of thousands of extradimensional epochs, he will not be able to step into the seventh dimension.

"Why is this test so difficult?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

The other tests were not a problem for him, and it stands to reason that the difficulty of this test should be of the same grade.

Maybe he's thinking wrong about something!

"That's right, some knowledge is common sense on the side of the Four Thousand Territory, and it is common knowledge for the Wumu Realm Lord, if you understand it, it's very simple. But we don't know about it, so we find this test extremely difficult. "

He pondered it carefully, and felt that he might not have truly comprehended the true way to pass this test.

Like now, passively accepting the tempering of the Will Stone, a method like this is definitely the stupidest and least efficient method, there should be other ways to speed up the tempering.

"Maybe if you want to pass this test, you need to create your own soul will refining method, which can speed up the efficiency by a hundred times or even a thousand times!"

He was going to give it a try, and even if he was wrong, it would only delay some time, but if it was true, he would be able to pass the test.

So, in the following days, he used this will stone to create his own method of refining the soul will.
